name: Planning With Files
description: Claude Code skill implementing Manus-style persistent markdown planning — the workflow pattern behind the $2B acquisition. Work like the AI agent company Meta acquired for $2 billion.
review: Viral, high-quality planning skill with 15k+ stars implementing Manus-style persistent markdown task management. Proven 96.7% benchmark pass rate, security-audited, actively maintained with broad multi-agent compatibility (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, etc.).
